source_pr.title: *: build and use count-min sketch
source_pr.body:
This PR builds count-min sketch when analyze and use it for point queries. Especially, we do not build it for primary key when it is handle and the unique index.
PTAL @coocood  @hanfei1991 @winoros @zz-jason

symptoms: // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
failure_signature: // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by a Go data race in the statistics cache/handle: table statistics objects can be read concurrently while the stats worker refreshes them from storage or writes new stats, and mutating a shared cached `Table` without copying can trigger race detector failures. This PR stabilizes it by using a copy-on-write approach (copy the cached table stats before updating histograms/CM sketch and related fields) so readers never observe concurrent in-place mutations.
fix_pattern: Use copy-on-write / deep copy of cached stats objects before mutation (e.g., `table.copy()` before updating) to avoid data races under concurrent reads.

evidence: evidence: // We copy it before writing to avoid race.

files: bootstrap.go, domain/domain.go, executor/aggregate_test.go, executor/analyze.go, executor/builder.go, session.go, statistics/builder.go, statistics/cmsketch.go, statistics/cmsketch_test.go, statistics/handle_test.go, statistics/histogram.go, statistics/sample.go, statistics/sample_test.go, statistics/statistics_test.go, statistics/table.go, store/tikv/mock-tikv/analyze.go, statistics/handle.go
